description: §14.8.7 — the same missing-file `<db>` block WITH a `?{}` CREATE TABLE for the scoped table builds an in-memory shadow DB and fires no E-PA-002. The clean control: a missing file is fine as long as the schema is recoverable from a CREATE TABLE.
source-test: compiler/src/protect-analyzer.ts (E-PA-002 fire site: resolveDb missing-file + no CREATE TABLE)
rationale: protect-analyzer resolveDb(): the `src=` file is still absent, but every scoped table now has a CREATE TABLE in a `?{}` block, so the analyzer builds the shadow DB from those statements and E-PA-002 never fires.
